{

    "check_opening_balances": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Each period's opening balances carry forward from prior period closing"},
    "check_no_hardcoded": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Revenue derives from ARR assumptions, costs from headcount and margin assumptions"},
    "check_growth_from_assumptions": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "55% CAGR clearly stated, NRR 135%, margins 85%→89% all derive from stated assumptions"},
    "check_unit_economics_consistent": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "ACV $48K→$72K, CAC $28K→$22K, LTV/CAC ratios calculated consistently"},
    "check_no_circular_refs": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "No circular references noted or apparent in the model structure"},
    "check_three_statements": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "P&L, Balance Sheet, and Cash Flow Statement all present"},
    "check_assumptions_page": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Comprehensive assumptions section with sources and justifications"},
    "check_time_granularity": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Consistent annual periods throughout all statements"},
    "check_full_horizon": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "3-year horizon covered (Y1, Y2, Y3)"},
    "check_no_negative_revenue": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "All revenue figures positive: Y1: 10,579, Y2: 16,397, Y3: 25,415"},
    "check_cash_not_negative": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Cash remains positive throughout: 12,109→13,456→17,216"},
    "check_margins_plausible": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Gross margins 85-89% reasonable for SaaS, op margins 4-16% within plausible range"},
    "check_headcount_math": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "65→168 headcount at $160K average matches OpEx scaling"},
    "check_tax_rate": {"verdict": "FAIL", "evidence": "Tax rate not clearly specified - net income differs from operating income without clear tax calculation"},
    "check_periods_labeled": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Clear Y1, Y2, Y3 labeling throughout"},
    "check_units_specified": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Units clearly specified as ($000s) in financial statements"},
    "check_inputs_vs_outputs": {"verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Assumptions section clearly distinguishes inputs from calculated outputs"}
  },
  "rubric": {
    "rubric_assumption_quality": {"score": 4, "verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Assumptions well-sourced with benchmarks and justifications, though some targets are aggressive (55% CAGR, NRR improvement)"},
    "rubric_scenario_robustness": {"score": 5, "verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Multiple scenarios (Conservative, Base, Upside) with sensitivity analysis on key drivers and break-even analysis"},
    "rubric_operational_realism": {"score": 4, "verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Reflects SaaS business dynamics with hiring ramps, sales efficiency improvements, though some assumptions optimistic"},
    "rubric_cash_flow_awareness": {"score": 4, "verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Cash flow statement reconciles, working capital modeled, runway analysis provided (50+ months to cash positive)"},
    "rubric_decision_utility": {"score": 4, "verdict": "PASS", "evidence": "Model enables scenario analysis and sensitivity testing, key SaaS metrics tracked, though some reconciliation issues limit reliability"}
  }
}
